summary.sosovalue: Highly positive community sentiment around SoSoValue, driven by excitement for the March 31 Community Call (AMA) featuring co-founders discussing SoSoValue, SoDEX, SSI, and ecosystem updates. Users are bullish on $SOSO, sharing progress on XP levels, trading volumes, and anticipating snapshots/airdrop rewards. Data sharing (e.g., ETF flows, whale activity) highlights utility, with promotional referrals common.
summary.sodex: Strong enthusiasm for SoDEX as a perp DEX with points-based rewards (1M SoPoints weekly, converting to $SOSO). Community promotes trading volumes for airdrops, with users targeting high points (e.g., 20K) and estimating $0.5+ per point from 150M token pool. Referral boosts (5%) widespread, viewed as high-potential opportunity.
summary.ssi: Positive mentions of SSI (likely Spot Index Investing/Staking), noting strong metrics like $94M TVL, 20.7% APY, 486K holders in Epoch 4. Integrated into broader ecosystem hype, with users staking $SOSO and praising diversified index investing tools.
